message: 🌱 Add envoy: tracing: Transition to OpenTelemetry from OpenTracing and Op mission (#359)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "envoy-9958-tracing-transition-to-opentelemetry-from-opentracing-and-opencensus",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "envoy: tracing: Transition to OpenTelemetry from OpenTracing and OpenCensus",
+    "description": "tracing: Transition to OpenTelemetry from OpenTracing and OpenCensus. This issue affects 94+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify envoy feature symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your envoy deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=envoy
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=envoy -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors related to: tracing: Transition to OpenTelemetry from OpenTracing and OpenCensus"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Service configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant envoy resources:
```bash
kubectl get service -A
kubectl describe service <name> -n <namespace>
```
*Title*: *Plan to transition to OpenTelemetry*

*Description*: Envoy currently supports OpenTracing (OTr) and OpenCensus (OC) [0]. In May 2019 it was announced that these projects were merging into th"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for tracing: Transition to OpenTelemetry from OpenTracing and Op",
+        "description": "Putting this up as a draft in case anyone wants to preview. I"m still actively refining and working out some details.

xref #399.
```yaml
receivers:
  otlp:
    protocols:
      grpc:
        endpoint: 0.0.0.0:4317
      http:
  jaeger:
    protocols:
      grpc:
      thrift_binary:
      thrift_compact:
      thrift_http:
  zipkin:
    
exporters:
  otlp:
    endpoint: ${tempo_sd}:4317
    tls:
      insecure: true
    sending_queue:
      num_consumers: 4
      queue_size: 100
    retry_on_failure:
      enabled: true
  logging:
    loglevel: debug
    sampling_initial: 5
    sampling_thereafter: 200
processors:
  batch:
  memory_limiter:
    # 80% of maximum memory up to 2G
    limit_mib: 400
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm tracing: Transition to OpenTelemetry from OpenTrac is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=envoy -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The root cause is: Putting this up as a draft in case anyone wants to preview. I"m still actively refining and working out some details.

xref #399.. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "receivers:
  otlp:
    protocols:
      grpc:
        endpoint: 0.0.0.0:4317
      http:
  jaeger:
    protocols:
      grpc:
      thrift_binary:
      thrift_compact:
      thrift_http:
  zipkin:
    
exporters:
  otlp:
    endpoint: ${tempo_sd}:4317
    tls:
      insecure: true
    sending_queue:
      num_consumers: 4
      queue_size: 100
    retry_on_failure:
      enabled: true
  logging:
    loglevel: debug
    sampling_initial: 5
    sampling_thereafter: 200
processors:
  batch:
  memory_limiter:
    # 80% of maximum memory up to 2G
    limit_mib: 400
    # 25% of limit up to 2G
    spike_limit_mib: 100
    check_interval: 5s
extensions:
  zpages: {}
  memory_ballast:
    # Memory Ballast size should be max 1/3 to 1/2 of memory.
    size_mi",
+        "Cool, since I'm using AWS Envoy which doesn't support `openCensusAgent` out of the box. perhaps I'll need to use the vanilla envoyproxy or extend aws envoy using `ENVOY_TRACING_CFG_FILE` and set it up.
Ill share my results. 
I managed to make it work with OpenCensus & OpenTelemetry agent configured to receive OpenCensus and send OpenTelemetry further. This will also connect the traces and pass the context around. Here are my config files.


Config working with envoy 1.20",
+        "OTEL Agent config used with otel/opentelemetry-collector:0.24.0"
+      ]
+    }
